question: Will Anthropic release a new model stronger than Haiku 4.5 before June 16?
textDescription:
Needs to be available in Claude Code

Haiku >=4.6, Sonnet >=4.7, Opus >= 4.8 and any other model stronger than Haiku 4.5 resolve yes. Needs to be stronger than Haiku 4.5 based on Anthropic release statements.

Resolves at UTC time
newsShortReason: Anthropic's recent model releases and deprecations suggest no new model stronger than Haiku 4.5 before June 16.
newsKeyEvidence: Anthropic released Sonnet 4.6 in February 2026, Opus 4.6 in February 2026, and Haiku 4.5 in October 2025, indicating a pattern of releasing models approximately every four months. | On April 14, 2026, Anthropic announced the retirement of Sonnet 4 and Opus 4 models, with recommended replacements being Sonnet 4.6 and Opus 4.7, respectively, suggesting a focus on updating existing models rather than releasing new ones. | There is no public information indicating that Anthropic plans to release a model stronger than Haiku 4.5 before June 16, 2026.
